Petition For Modification Of Trust (Probate Code Section 15403)
Off Calendar Mar-04-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Nelsen for Sonya Ruehl.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition For Modification Of The Trust, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Petition For Modification Of Trust (Probate Code Section 15403)
Off Calendar Feb-19-2008 Continued To Mar-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
